title: AKEF BGMI Gaming Saga
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: AKEF BGMI Gaming Saga}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=5 |name=AKEF BGMI Gaming Saga |tickername=AKEF: GS |shortname=AKEF: GS |image=AKEF Gaming Saga.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=BGMI Gaming Saga |organizer=AKEF |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/akefofficial/ |sponsor=[https://www.amd.com/ AMD]
[https://www.crucial.com/ Crucial]
[https://www.grigs.store/ G Rigs] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-25 |edate=2021-09-26 |twitter= |instagram=akefofficial |web=https://www.akef.in |discord=VXemGjQ |facebook=akefofficial |youtube=c/GamingDoctorYT }} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/akefofficial/ AKEF]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.amd.com/ AMD]''''', '''''[https://www.crucial.com/ Crucial]''''', and '''''[https://www.grigs.store/ G Rigs]''''' present a Invitational BGMI tournament called the '''''AKEF BGMI Gaming Saga''''' with a total prize pool of ₹1,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Malyalam Commentator |b1=PNX Rithu|b1name=Rithurag Bapu|b1flag=in |b2=Katzy Gaming|b2flag=in|b2name=Anjitha JM |b3=Two Face Gaming|b3flag=in |b4=Venatus YT|b4flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''AKEF BGMI Gaming Saga:''' 7th September 2021 to 26th September 2021.'' '''''Pre-Qualifiers:''' 7th September 2021 to 11th September 2021.'' * '' A total of 1000 teams will play in Pre-Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 50 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 6 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 300 teams}} advance to Qualifiers.''
'''''Qualifiers:''' 13th September 2021 to 15th September 2021'' * '' A total of 300 teams will play in Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 15 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter-Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 120 teams}} advance to the Quarter-Finals.''
'''''Quarter-Finals:''' 18th September 2021 to 19th September 2021'' * '' A total of 120 teams will play in Quarter-Finals * '' Teams to be divided into 6 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' * '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 48 teams}} advance to Semi Finals.''
'''''Semi Finals:''' 21st September 2021 to 23rd September 2021'' * '' A total of 48 teams will play in the Semi Finals'' * '' Teams to be divided into 6 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 6 matches'' * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 18 teams}} will advance to the Grand Finals.''
'''''Grand Finals:''' 23rd September 2021 to 25th September 2021'' * '' A total of 18 teams will play in the Grand Finals'' * '' Teams will get to play a total of 12 matches in a period of 2 days'' * '' Each day will feature a total of 6 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''2 Matchdays: 6 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>S>>M>>E ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Kill Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |-
